style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=9;fontColor=#B71C1C;align=left;" value="<b>已满页 (Page A)</b><br>┌─ User Records ─┐<br>│ ██████████████ │<br>│ ██ style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#FFCCBC;strokeColor=#E64A19;fontColor=#BF360C;rounded=1;" value="<b>写入新记录</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="100" x="210" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="arrow_s1" edge="1" parent="1" source="old_page" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#E64A19;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=classic;" target="new_page_a" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage2_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1A237E;rounded=1;" value="<b>阶段 ❷：分配新页 + 数据对半分</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="380" x="30" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new_page_a" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1B5E20;align=left;" value="<b>Page A (前一半)</b><br>┌─ User Records ─┐<br>│ █████ ~50% │<br>│ │<br>│ Free:~8KB │<br>└──────────────┘" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="140" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="new_page_b" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=9;fontColor=#1B5E20;align=left;" value="<b>Page B (后一半) ✨新</b><br>┌─ User Records ─┐<br>│ █████ ~50% │<br>│ │<br>│ Free:~8KB │<br>└──────────────┘" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="140" x="240" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="linked" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#E65100;" value="<b>A.next ↔ B.prev</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="50" x="185" y="275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stage3_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1A237E;rounded=1;" value="<b>阶段 ❸：父节点新增键 + 指针 → 递归检查</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="25" width="380" x="30" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="parent" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=9;fontColor=#0D47A1;align=left;" value="<b>父节点</b><br>旧: [ ... | 指针A ]<br>新: [ ... | 指针A | <b>新键B | 指针B</b> ]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="220" x="100" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="recurse_note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=10;fontColor=#E65100;rounded=1;" value="<b>⚠ 父节点满了？→ 继续向上分裂，直到根。根满了 → 新根 + 树高+1</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="460" x="60" y="475" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_AB" edge="1" parent="1" source="new_page_a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#E65100;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;" target="new_page_b"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

新: [ ... | 指针A | 新键B | 指针B ]
